author: doll-agent
content: Implemented complex/scalar predicates in ferray-ufunc::ops::complex: iscomplex (per-element imaginary != 0 on Complex<T> arrays); iscomplex_real (always-false on real arrays); isreal / isreal_real (per-element imaginary == 0 / always-true); iscomplexobj (dtype-based bool, uses T::dtype().is_complex()); isrealobj (negation of iscomplexobj); isscalar (true for 0-D arrays). Rust's static type system forces the iscomplex/isreal split into _real and Complex<T> variants, since real-dtype arrays are statically distinct types. 6 unit tests cover all variants. Re-exported via ferray-ufunc lib.rs and umbrella ferray crate.
